text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Gah, how could I be so weak? ...This<n>morning, I
unleashed a forbidden move<n>on my alarm clock.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I was being chased in my dream, you<n>see... and
that's when it went off... Ugh,<n>how could I fail to
regain my<n>composure?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
No, I cannot let outrage at my own<n>weakness stop
me—instead I must face<n>that weakness head on.
And the first<n>step is learning to control my
emotions.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Then I can polish my technique, and one<n>day
defeat those ghosts!
